task_completion.visual_evidence: The main window of Gretl shows 'usa.gdt' as the active dataset, or a script/console command is visible loading 'usa.gdt'.

task_completion.description: Conduct an ADF test on 'gdp' in levels using 4 lags with a Constant and Trend
task_completion.visual_evidence: An output window, console output, or script command showing an ADF test on 'gdp' with 4 lags and a constant and trend (e.g., 'adf 4 gdp --c --ct' or GUI equivalent).

task_completion.description: Conduct an ADF test on the first difference of 'gdp' using 4 lags with a Constant only
task_completion.visual_evidence: An output window, console output, or script command showing an ADF test on the first difference of 'gdp' (like d_gdp or diff(gdp)) with 4 lags and a constant only (e.g., 'adf 4 diff(gdp) --c' or GUI equivalent).

task_completion.description: Conduct an ADF test on 'inf' in levels using 4 lags with a Constant only
task_completion.visual_evidence: An output window, console output, or script command showing an ADF test on 'inf' with 4 lags and a constant only (e.g., 'adf 4 inf --c' or GUI equivalent).

task_completion.description: Save the results of all three tests to the specified output file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor, terminal, or file manager showing the file `adf_results.txt` located exactly in `/home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/` containing the combined results of the three tests.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent actually used Gretl (GUI or CLI) to generate the results.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show Gretl software interface, console, or a script being executed, rather than the agent just typing fabricated statistical results directly into a text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the output format matches genuine statistical software output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The contents of adf_results.txt should look like standard Gretl output (including test statistics, p-values, and lag information), not manually summarized text.

integrity.description: Verify the output file is saved in the correct directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file path must be explicitly visible as /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/adf_results.txt in a save dialog, file manager, or terminal command.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires three specific ADF tests using Gretl: (1) 'gdp' in levels, 4 lags, constant and trend (Gretl flags: --c --ct); (2) first difference of 'gdp' (diff(gdp) or d_gdp), 4 lags, constant only (Gretl flag: --c); (3) 'inf' in levels, 4 lags, constant only (Gretl flag: --c). The output must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/adf_results.txt.
